_comment: Default normalization toggles a generated parser may consult via parser_lib. Domain-agnostic and conservative: anything that could damage legitimate data is off by default. Copy into a job folder and tune per table.

hyphenation._desc: dehyphenate_linebreak merges 'word- word' (safe). merge_no_space_hyphen also merges 'wo-rd' (catches 'pe-nangkap', riskier) — enable per-table when the source has intra-word line-break hyphens. protect_reduplication keeps 'undang-undang'/'sehari-hari' intact when merging (recommended for Indonesian/Malay).

placeholders._desc: Map bare placeholders to empty string / drop from arrays (guideline: '-' -> empty).

trailing_conjunctions._desc: Off by default: dropping trailing 'dan'/'and' can change legal meaning. Enable only when the source clearly splits sentences across rows and you want them rejoined or trimmed.

numeric_codes._desc: Preserve identifier-like numbers (codes, IDs) as strings to keep leading zeros.
